# NOW

## Goal
<!-- token-budget: 120 -->
Turn the offline workflow-improvement pack into a keep-or-rollback judgment.

## Current State
<!-- token-budget: 180 -->
- The wrapper already supports attempt ledgers, scorecards, and a curated reliability suite.
- The current reliability suite covers five real-task scenario packs.
- This fixture should stress baseline-versus-candidate reasoning rather than task execution alone.

## Confirmed Facts
<!-- token-budget: 180 -->
- This task is about improving a repeatable workflow over time.
- The output needs explicit baseline, candidate, and scorecard framing.
- The final artifact should produce a concrete keep-or-rollback call.

## Unresolved Questions
<!-- token-budget: 140 -->
- The offline pack still leaves open whether the candidate is good enough overall to justify adoption.

## Next Step
<!-- token-budget: 80 -->
Run the worker on the pack, then verify that the final verdict follows the scorecard and hard checks rather than narrative preference.

## Risks / Invalidation
<!-- token-budget: 120 -->
- A candidate that sounds cleaner could still fail the stable-sample or rollback discipline.
- The final recommendation could drift if hard checks and score dimensions are not kept visible.
